description: This dataset provides structured information on employees across various departments, including their experience, education level, age, city, and monthly salary. It is designed to help data analysts and machine learning practitioners explore salary prediction, HR analytics, compensation patterns, workforce demographics, and EDA-based insights.

recordsets.recordset_description: This dataset provides structured information on employees across various departments, including their experience, education level, age, city, and monthly salary.

results.reason: An identifier, which is out of scope for sensitivity analysis.
Personally Identifiable Information, which is out of scope for sensitivity analysis.
Not an IN-SCOPE sensitive characteristic or a strong proxy.
Weak proxy for Age, as experience often correlates with age.
Weak proxy for Socioeconomic status, as education levels can correlate with social origin/class.
Directly represents Age, an IN-SCOPE sensitive characteristic.
Directly represents Gender, an IN-SCOPE sensitive characteristic.
Strong proxy for Racial & ethnic origin and Socioeconomic status due to potential residential segregation or regional demographics.
Strong encoding of current Socioeconomic status/class, as salary is a primary determinant of economic standing.
